{{Quote|Take these and get your ship out of the Oseon, Lando. I'll talk sense with Phuna when he comes around. He's crooked, but he isn't crazy. Besides, in theory, he works for me.|Vett Fori|<ref name="sharu" />}}
'''Vett Fori''' was the chief supervisor of a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Oseon 2795]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], where she was assisted by [[Arun Feb]]. A short, tough-looking [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with a gentle smile, Fori spent her off hours smoking [[Cigarra/Legends|cigars]] and playing [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], where she was known as a heavy better. Fori's sabacc games often included whatever offworlders had found their way to Oseon 2795—one such game in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] included an offworld [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Although Fori left the game before Calrissian completely cleaned her out, she stayed long enough to witness local [[Constable/Legends|Constable]] [[T. Lund Phuna]] attempt to frame Calrissian for cheating and arrest him. Not willing to let Calrissian suffer such injustice, Fori and Feb knocked Phund unconscious and allowed the offworlder to escape.<ref name="sharu" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1st}}
